title: Video Of Anurag Thakur Eating Fish Curry In Bengal Goes Viral Amid Mamata Banerjee's 'Ban' Prediction
description: A video of BJP leaders, including Anurag Thakur, eating fish curry while campaigning for the West Bengal Assembly elections is going viral on social media. Earlier, CM Mamata Banerjee claimed that BJP will stop the consumption of fish and egg if they form a government in Bengal.
